title: rubus alpestris normalis
intro: Rubus alpestris normalis, also known as the alpine raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its thorny stems and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus alpestris normalis include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Rubus alpestris normalis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
